Gluten-Sensitive: While we offer gluten-free menu options, we're not a gluten-free kitchen. Cross-contamination may occur. We're unable to ensure that any item can be completely free of allergens.
*Consuming raw or undercooked meats, poultry, seafood, shellfish, or eggs may increase the risk of food-borne illness.
Before placing your order, please inform your server if anyone in your party has a food allergy.
